title: sedum douglasii subsp. ciliosum
intro: Sedum douglasii subsp. ciliosum, also known as Douglas' stonecrop or Douglas' sedum, is a succulent plant species in the genus Sedum, native to the southwestern United States and Mexico. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing due to its high concentration of antioxidants and saponins. The health benefits of Sedum douglasii subsp. ciliosum include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce the risk of cancer, and improve skin and digestive health. Sedum douglasii subsp. ciliosum can be prepared as a herbal tea, decoction, or tincture, making it a versatile and accessible medicinal plant.
